docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY RAMOS, JHUNNIE AS TO DEFENDANT DE MESA, CLARISSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
